name: Tortellini Cheese Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hoop, pot or ricotta cheese
1 lb Mozzarella cheese, grated - or shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil over medium heat in a small pot.
2. Add onions and garlic to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
3. Scrape the mixture into a large bowl.
4. Add salt, pepper, mace, thyme, and the three cheeses to the bowl.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
6. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and mix to combine.
7. The stuffing can be stored, covered, in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
8. To freeze, portion the stuffing into airtight freezer bags or containers, label, and store in the freezer for up to 3 months.
9. Makes 6 cups of filling.
